glosses.nb: det vil si; med andre ord
glosses.sv: det vill säga; med andra ord
glosses.da: det vil sige; med andre ord

sentences.target: On se voit demain, c'est-à-dire mardi.

translations.fr: On se voit demain, c'est-à-dire mardi.
translations.en: We’ll see each other tomorrow, meaning Tuesday.
translations.es: Nos vemos mañana, es decir, el martes.
translations.de: Wir sehen uns morgen, das heißt am Dienstag.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们明天见，也就是说星期二。
translations.yue: 我哋聽日見，即係星期二。
translations.ru: Увидимся завтра, то есть во вторник.
translations.pt: Nós nos vemos amanhã, ou seja, na terça-feira.
translations.vi: Chúng ta gặp nhau vào ngày mai, tức là thứ Ba.
translations.nl: We zien elkaar morgen, dat wil zeggen dinsdag.
translations.hi: हम कल मिलेंगे, यानी मंगलवार को.
translations.pl: Zobaczymy się jutro, to znaczy we wtorek.
translations.el: Θα βρεθούμε αύριο, δηλαδή την Τρίτη.
translations.nb: Vi sees i morgen, altså på tirsdag.
translations.id: Kita bertemu besok, artinya hari Selasa.
translations.sv: Vi ses i morgon, det vill säga på tisdag.
translations.cs: Uvidíme se zítra, to znamená v úterý.
translations.da: Vi ses i morgen, det vil sige tirsdag.
translations.ja: 明日会うよ、つまり火曜日だ。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal subject pronoun (often used for ‘we’ in colloquial French); triggers 3rd person singular verb agreement.
Clitic reflexive/reciprocal pronoun; forms the pronominal verb ‘se voir’ indicating reciprocity (‘see each other’).
Finite main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular, agreeing with ‘on’.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb, specifying the time of the action.
Contracted demonstrative pronoun before a vowel; subject of the copula within the fixed expression ‘c’est à dire’.
Copular auxiliary; part of the discourse marker ‘c’est à dire’ introducing an explanation/clarification.
Preposition; in this idiom combines with the infinitive to form ‘à dire’.
Infinitive; with ‘c’est’ and ‘à’ forms the fixed discourse marker ‘c’est-à-dire’ (‘that is to say’).
Name of a weekday functioning as a nominal predicate/value being clarified.

sentences.target: Tu peux venir, c'est-à-dire après le travail.
sentences.reading: /ty pø vəniʁ sɛ.t‿a.diʁ apʁɛ lə tʁavaj/

translations.fr: Tu peux venir, c'est-à-dire après le travail.
translations.ipa: /ty pø vəniʁ sɛ.t‿a.diʁ apʁɛ lə tʁavaj/
translations.en: You can come, meaning after work.
translations.es: Puedes venir, es decir, después del trabajo.
translations.de: Du kannst kommen, das heißt nach der Arbeit.
translations.it: Puoi venire, cioè dopo il lavoro.
translations.ko: 올 수 있어, 즉 퇴근 후에.
translations.zh-Hans: 你可以来，也就是说下班以后。
translations.yue: 你可以嚟，即係放工之後。
translations.ru: Ты можешь прийти, то есть после работы.
translations.pt: Você pode vir, ou seja, depois do trabalho.
translations.he: אתה יכול לבוא, כלומר אחרי העבודה.
translations.vi: Bạn có thể đến, tức là sau giờ làm.
translations.ar: يمكنك أن تأتي، أي بعد العمل.
translations.nl: Je kunt komen, dat wil zeggen na het werk.
translations.uk: Ти можеш прийти, тобто після роботи.
translations.hu: El tudsz jönni, vagyis munka után.
translations.hi: तुम आ सकते हो, यानी काम के बाद.
translations.pl: Możesz przyjść, to znaczy po pracy.
translations.el: Μπορείς να έρθεις, δηλαδή μετά τη δουλειά.
translations.nb: Du kan komme, altså etter jobb.
translations.id: Kamu bisa datang, artinya setelah kerja.
translations.sv: Du kan komma, det vill säga efter jobbet.
translations.ro: Poți să vii, adică după serviciu.
translations.cs: Můžeš přijít, to znamená po práci.
translations.da: Du kan komme, det vil sige efter arbejde.
translations.ja: 来ていいよ, つまり仕事の後だ。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular subject pronoun.
Modal auxiliary indicating ability; present indicative 2nd person singular.
Infinitive main verb complement of the modal ‘peux’.
Contracted demonstrative pronoun; subject of copula in the idiom ‘c’est-à-dire’.
Copular auxiliary; part of the discourse marker ‘c’est-à-dire’ introducing the clarification.
Preposition; component of ‘à dire’ within the idiom.
Infinitive; completes the fixed expression ‘c’est-à-dire’.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement.
Definite article, masculine singular, determiner for ‘travail’.
Common noun headed by the article; object of the preposition ‘après’.

sentences.target: Je travaille à distance, c'est-à-dire de chez moi.
sentences.reading: /ʒə tʁavaj a distɑ̃s sɛ.t‿a.diʁ də ʃe mwa/

translations.fr: Je travaille à distance, c'est-à-dire de chez moi.
translations.ipa: /ʒə tʁavaj a distɑ̃s sɛ.t‿a.diʁ də ʃe mwa/
translations.en: I work remotely, meaning from home.
translations.es: Trabajo a distancia, es decir, desde casa.
translations.de: Ich arbeite remote, das heißt von zu Hause.
translations.it: Lavoro da remoto, cioè da casa.
translations.zh-Hans: 我远程办公，也就是说在家里。
translations.yue: 我做遙距工作，即係喺屋企。
translations.ru: Я работаю удаленно, то есть из дома.
translations.pt: Eu trabalho remotamente, ou seja, de casa.
translations.vi: Tôi làm việc từ xa, tức là ở nhà.
translations.ar: أعمل عن بُعد، أي من البيت.
translations.nl: Ik werk op afstand, dat wil zeggen vanuit huis.
translations.uk: Я працюю віддалено, тобто з дому.
translations.hi: मैं दूर से काम करता हूँ, यानी घर से.
translations.pl: Pracuję zdalnie, to znaczy z domu.
translations.el: Δουλεύω εξ αποστάσεως, δηλαδή από το σπίτι.
translations.nb: Jeg jobber på avstand, altså hjemmefra.
translations.id: Saya bekerja secara jarak jauh, artinya dari rumah.
translations.sv: Jag jobbar på distans, det vill säga hemifrån.
translations.ro: Lucrez de la distanță, adică de acasă.
translations.cs: Pracuji na dálku, to znamená z domova.
translations.da: Jeg arbejder på afstand, det vil sige hjemmefra.
translations.ja: リモートで働いている、つまり自宅からだ。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject pronoun.
Finite main verb, present indicative 1st person singular.
Preposition introducing the PP ‘à distance’.
Common noun as object of ‘à’; in the set phrase ‘à distance’ meaning ‘remotely’.
Contracted demonstrative pronoun; subject of copula in the idiom ‘c’est-à-dire’.
Copular auxiliary; part of the discourse marker ‘c’est-à-dire’ introducing a rephrasing.
Preposition in ‘à dire’ within the idiom.
Infinitive completing ‘c’est-à-dire’.
Preposition introducing the locative phrase.
Preposition meaning ‘at the home/house of’; governs the following strong pronoun.
Strong/stressed personal pronoun (1sg) complement of ‘chez’.

sentences.target: Ça commence tout de suite, c'est-à-dire maintenant.
sentences.reading: /sa kɔmɑ̃s tu d(ə) sɥit sɛ.t‿a.diʁ mɛ̃tənɑ̃/

translations.fr: Ça commence tout de suite, c'est-à-dire maintenant.
translations.ipa: /sa kɔmɑ̃s tu d(ə) sɥit sɛ.t‿a.diʁ mɛ̃tənɑ̃/
translations.en: It starts right away, meaning now.
translations.de: Es beginnt sofort, das heißt jetzt.
translations.zh-Hans: 马上开始，也就是说现在。
translations.vi: Bắt đầu ngay, tức là bây giờ.
translations.nl: Het begint meteen, dat wil zeggen nu.
translations.hi: यह तुरंत शुरू होता है, यानी अभी.
translations.pl: Zaczyna się od razu, to znaczy teraz.
translations.nb: Det starter med en gang, altså nå.
translations.sv: Det börjar direkt, det vill säga nu.
translations.da: Det starter med det samme, det vil sige nu.
translations.ja: すぐ始まる、つまり今だ。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative pronoun functioning as subject.
Finite main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular.
Adverbial intensifier within the fixed locution ‘tout de suite’ (‘right away’).
Preposition; part of the idiomatic adverbial phrase ‘tout de suite’.
Common noun (‘following/continuation’) used inside the idiom ‘tout de suite’ to form an adverb meaning ‘immediately’.
Contracted demonstrative pronoun; subject of copula in the idiom ‘c’est-à-dire’.
Copular auxiliary; part of the discourse marker ‘c’est-à-dire’ introducing the explicit paraphrase.
Preposition forming ‘à dire’ within the idiom.
Infinitive; completes the fixed expression ‘c’est-à-dire’.
Temporal adverb meaning ‘now’; the clarified time reference.

app_payload.word_nb: det vil si; med andre ord
app_payload.word_sv: det vill säga; med andra ord
app_payload.word_da: det vil sige; med andre ord
jp: On se voit demain, c'est-à-dire mardi.
Tu peux venir, c'est-à-dire après le travail.
Je travaille à distance, c'est-à-dire de chez moi.
Ça commence tout de suite, c'est-à-dire maintenant.
fu: /ty pø vəniʁ sɛ.t‿a.diʁ apʁɛ lə tʁavaj/
/ʒə tʁavaj a distɑ̃s sɛ.t‿a.diʁ də ʃe mwa/
/sa kɔmɑ̃s tu d(ə) sɥit sɛ.t‿a.diʁ mɛ̃tənɑ̃/
fr: On se voit demain, c'est-à-dire mardi.
Tu peux venir, c'est-à-dire après le travail.
Je travaille à distance, c'est-à-dire de chez moi.
Ça commence tout de suite, c'est-à-dire maintenant.
ipa: /ty pø vəniʁ sɛ.t‿a.diʁ apʁɛ lə tʁavaj/
/ʒə tʁavaj a distɑ̃s sɛ.t‿a.diʁ də ʃe mwa/
/sa kɔmɑ̃s tu d(ə) sɥit sɛ.t‿a.diʁ mɛ̃tənɑ̃/
en: We’ll see each other tomorrow, meaning Tuesday.
You can come, meaning after work.
I work remotely, meaning from home.
It starts right away, meaning now.

Puedes venir, es decir, después del trabajo.
Trabajo a distancia, es decir, desde casa.

यह तुरंत शुरू होता है, यानी अभी.

Możesz przyjść, to znaczy po pracy.
